
# Local Environment Files (Prevent pushing secrets/keys)
.env
.env*.local
.env.development
.env.test

# Heavy Python / Virtual Environments (If present)
.venv
venv
ENV/
env/
__pycache__/
*.pyc

# Build Artifacts & Desktop Binaries
build/
dist/
desktop/
*.spec

*.exe
*.dmg

# Dependencies & Caches
node_modules/
.cache/
.next/
.nuxt/

# Version Control & IDE Settings
.git/
.github/
.vscode/
.idea/

# OS-generated Files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
